headline: The Bull Case For Deere (DE) Could Change Following New U.S. Frontier Cutter Manufacturing Partnership
summary: In March 2026, John Deere and Tarter USA announced a manufacturing partnership to produce American-made Frontier Flex Wing Rotary Cutters in Kentucky, with early dealer orders and field testing indicating strong adoption and validated performance. By combining Deere’s precision-focused product strategy with Tarter’s advanced, highly automated production facility, the collaboration underscores how equipment innovation is increasingly tied to domestic manufacturing capability and scalable,...

headline: Grocery shock on the horizon for approaching U.S. elections as Iran war drags on
summary: "It just pisses them off more," said Rep. Vicente Gonzalez, D-Texas, said in an interview when asked about how voters will react if food gets more expensive.
